rawContext: Start from one feature: safe local export. The maintainer needs a packet created from explicit local notes only.
problem: Local feature notes need one bounded implementation packet before any downstream handoff.
outcome: The maintainer can validate one explicit feature packet without governance or topology side effects.
includedScope: Create one packet from explicit local context.
acceptanceCriteria: Given explicit local context, when the create workflow runs with --confirm, then it writes packet, run metadata, and receipt only under the configured packet root.
constraints: Do not infer identity, phase, topology, or scope from branch name, open editor, or cwd/current working directory.
Do not write Lens governance, release clone, top-down runtime, Landscape, Derived Graph, Salmon, promotion, adjacency, pressure, roadmap, service, domain, or program truth paths.
assumptions: The operator supplied the source notes explicitly.
implementationContext: Implement only the safe local export packet behavior and validators described here.
